name: Adipose stem cell exosome solution improved skin-aging measures
summary: A 12-week randomized split-face study reported improved wrinkles, elasticity, hydration, pigmentation, and global aesthetic scores with exosome-containing solution plus microneedling.
statement: In 28 individuals, adipose stem cell-derived exosome-containing solution plus microneedling outperformed saline plus microneedling on Global Aesthetic Improvement Scale and objective wrinkle, elasticity, hydration, and pigmentation measures, with no serious adverse events reported.
population_or_model: Adults receiving split-face treatment for facial skin aging
time_horizon: Three sessions separated by 3-week intervals with final follow-up 6 weeks after the last session
quantitative_note: The Global Aesthetic Improvement Scale favored the exosome-treated side at final follow-up (p = 0.005).
caveats: The endpoint is skin aging and appearance, not systemic healthspan, disease prevention, or intrinsic-capacity function.
The product was used with microneedling, so the effect should not be generalized to standalone exosome products.
Sample size and follow-up were small for durability or safety inference.
